Project: UDI-DICOM Evidence Validator

Purpose: validate a minimal synthetic UDI-DICOM evidence manifest and produce a
deterministic receipt and Markdown report.

Primary files: `spec/`, `schema/`, `examples/public/`, `src/udi_dicom_validator/`,
`tests/`, `demo/portable-ultrasound/`.

Quickstart: install with `pip install -e '.[dev,api]'`, run `pytest -q`, then
`python demo/portable-ultrasound/run_demo.py`.

Allowed claims: deterministic public evidence consistency checks for synthetic
or de-identified metadata, offline registry fixture review, public demo.

Disallowed claims: clinical validation, regulatory approval, safety assurance,
certification, PACS/VNA replacement, private suite disclosure, real patient data
processing by default.

Preferred citation: see `CITATION.cff`.


v0.2 note: manifests may include `synthetic_workflow_trace_id`, `provenance`, and optional `fdo_mapping`; these are synthetic metadata, not clinical/regulatory proof.

v0.3 note: use `scripts/generate_golden_receipts.py`,
`scripts/check_golden_receipts.py`, and
`scripts/build_public_evaluation_matrix.py` for reproducible public checks. The
MCP skeleton is public-only and read-only.
